title: cynosurus elegans subsp. aurasiacus
intro: Cynosurus elegans subsp. aurasiacus, also known as the Aurasiacus Cynosurus, is a subspecies of the Cynosurus elegans plant, a type of grass native to the Iberian Peninsula and southwestern France. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and as a diuretic. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and help to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Cynosurus elegans subsp. aurasiacus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders and promote overall well-being.
